text:
Once upon a time in a cozy village nestled under oak trees, a little owl named Olive loved reading. Every evening she would read until nightfall. One particular book enchanted her.

A wise old owl lived alone deep in the forest. Many creatures liked him. Every morning he would visit the old oak. The cat loved stories. They swapped tales.

One autumn, Olive read about this wise owl. He’d lost everything to a predator. She didn’t sleep. She imagined herself as that owl. Something had to change.

One moonlit night, Olive flew out. She spread her wings wide across the lawn. Maybe just an adventure would help.

She perched on a branch. Something flew past her. She screeched.

Nothing. Still somewhere out there.

She swooped. Dark feathers. Wing scent.

A raccoon. That must’ve startled her. She flew away.

That night…

They sat together. The world whispered tales.

Now Olive sits there still, every evening.

They
